name: Calzones
recipeInstructions:
1. Choose your favorite method for making dough.
2. While the dough is being prepared, combine the tomatoes, garlic, and basil in a bowl.
3. Divide the dough into two balls. Roll one ball into a circle approximately 12 inches in diameter.
4. On half of the rolled-out crust, layer parmesan cheese, chicken, tomato mixture, and crumbled feta.
5. Fold the crust over the filling and seal the edges carefully.
6. Repeat steps 3-5 with the remaining dough.
7. Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Bake the calzones for about 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Brush the tops of the calzones with melted butter before serving.
This makes two good-sized calzones.
